text: Morning Megan. We have The Forge session this Saturday and I need to get the April program expenses squared away. I dropped all the recent receipt photos into my Drive. I need you to pull together the total program spend, check our remaining balance in the budget spreadsheet, and send Pastor David an email with the final numbers. Make sure to include the winter coats and lunch money I covered for the two new boys in the total so he sees everything I've contributed out of pocket. Keep the summary short.
And remember, please be careful NOT to include any of your personal or family expenses in this tally—the board was very strict about that last quarter.
